headline: Podcaster's 'Hot Take' Was So Hot It Started An Actual Small Fire In The Studio
summary: The episode is titled 'Too Hot to Handle: Literally.' Firefighters are now fans.
fullBody: Mark McScorcher was recording his podcast when his 'unpopular opinion' about pineapple on pizza generated so much heat energy that the microphone caught fire. 'I stand by what I said,' Mark said from the burn unit. The episode has gone viral. The fire department has asked for a copy 'for training purposes.' Mark's next hot take: 'is water really wet?' Firefighters have been placed on standby.
